content.heroSubtitle: Experience the divine taste of authentic vegetarian cuisine.
content.aboutText: Shivnandi Pure Veg has been serving authentic and traditional vegetarian cuisine with the highest quality ingredients. We believe in providing an exceptional dining experience. Come taste the purity of our carefully crafted dishes, made fresh daily.
content.contactAddress: dhule solapur highway kasabkheda near ghrushneswar temple

menu.name: Paneer Tikka
menu.description: Delicious marinated paneer roasted in tandoor.

menu.name: Veg Manchurian
menu.description: Crispy vegetable balls tossed in soy-garlic sauce.

menu.name: Shivnandi Special Thali
menu.description: A wholesome thali with unlimited sabzis, dal, roti, rice, and sweet.

menu.name: Dal Makhani
menu.description: Creamy and rich black lentils slow-cooked overnight.
